title: Cozy Smoky Chicken Tacos
description: Moist chicken in a smoky sauce, served in a crispy french baguette with a side of casabe chips. Perfect for a cozy mexican dinner.

ingredients.name: cozy chipotle peppers in adobo sauce

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together cumin, coriander, salt, and pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the chicken to the oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is baking, prepare the smoky sauce by combining the chipotle peppers and adobo sauce in a blender or food processor.
Spoon the smoky sauce over the chicken and return to the oven for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Meanwhile, toast the french baguette slices in the oven for 2-3 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Assemble the tacos by placing a piece of the chicken onto a toasted baguette slice, followed by a sprinkle of gratin cheese.
Serve immediately, with casabe chips on the side.
